purpose: Track what happened after a useful learning/resource prompt was inspected: implemented scout, linked issue, generated artifact, deliberate skip, or stale follow-up.

rows.prompt: Textured light, shadow play, mesh/glowing lights, pack-shot camera controls, zoom/focal blur, and studio tables.
rows.lesson: Turn lighting and camera lessons into fixed-view sweep boards before copying any old render settings.
rows.notes: Depth-of-field and hard-surface edge-light follow-ups remain issue-backed even though the core lighting scouts exist.

rows.prompt: Multilayer skin/SSS thinking, translucent-vs-transparent materials, smoke, and alpha billboards.
rows.lesson: Separate material-read scouts from atmospheric card and smoke exercises so thumbnails reveal different failure modes.
rows.notes: SSS, transparency, and layered material component diagnosis are implemented; alpha-billboard smoke and translucent diffuser light objects still need dedicated issue work.

rows.prompt: Texture-node thinking, candle/face SSS, trial-and-error material lighting, and environment-lighting mood.
rows.lesson: Translate older node/UI prompts into current procedural texture, terrain, and lighting axes.
rows.notes: The broad environment, concrete light/texture, and reusable surface texture-node boards exist; caustic water remains open.

rows.prompt: Virtual sets that survive multiple camera setups, displacement landscapes, SSS ice, render passes, and compositing.
rows.lesson: Keep scene robustness, landscape structure, and finishing-look sweeps inspectable as separate surfaces.
rows.notes: Implemented boards cover terrain, camera, pass diagnostics, and look sweeps; reference-guided targets and multi-camera robustness remain open.

rows.prompt: Translucent printed china-ball lighting objects and mixed hard-surface/organic material workflows.
rows.lesson: Use as art-direction language and turn concrete material/light-object ideas into small scouts or issues.
rows.notes: No dedicated scout exists yet; diffuser, hard-surface, layered material, and reference-guided scout issues cover the next work.

rows.prompt: SpaceX plume frame references and adjacent vacuum plume studies.
rows.lesson: Use plume references to calibrate alpha shell, texture density, broad expansion shape, and overdone/whiteout failure anchors.
rows.notes: Non-PDF reference media is represented here so future agents do not treat it as outside the learning pipeline.

rows.prompt: Reference-use prompts for distinct knight lighting studies with scene, lighting, preserve, and improve-after constraints.
rows.lesson: Carry selected structure/lighting studies forward as handoff prompt cards instead of treating PNGs as final art.
rows.notes: Covered by reference-guided sweeps, handoff cards, and artifact-index follow-ups.

rows.prompt: Reference-use prompts for knight pose/bind studies with structure-preservation constraints.
rows.lesson: Preserve figure and trainer separation through handoff cards and reusable fixture/reference-scene support.
rows.notes: This is local-study coverage rather than PDF triage; it points to the workflow issues that make the studies reusable.
